tasks.instruction: Find early cherry tomato varieties that mature in 65 days or less, are rated at least 4 stars, and add the first two matching options to a comparison view.

tasks.instruction: Find tomato varieties with compact or container growth habits that stay under 24 inches tall, then add the first three alphabetically to your favorites list.

tasks.instruction: Find a paste tomato for canning that matures in about 70–80 days and is resistant to fusarium wilt, then add one such variety to your garden plan with 10 plants and a transplant date you choose in mid-August 2026.

tasks.instruction: Using the planting calendar tool, set location to ZIP code 98101, generate spring planting dates for cherry-type tomatoes, and add 5 plants of the third cherry option to your calendar on a chosen date in late April.

tasks.instruction: Find heirloom tomato varieties with ratings of at least 3 stars that list at least one disease resistance, and add three of these to a side‑by‑side comparison view.

tasks.instruction: Take a tomato preference quiz by selecting sweet flavor, fresh salads as the main use, a small balcony or patio for space, and an early harvest, then add the first recommended tomato variety to your favorites list.

tasks.instruction: Find red tomatoes recommended for salads that mature in about 70–80 days and are labeled crack‑resistant, then add the highest‑rated matching variety to your garden plan with 6 plants and a planting date you choose in late May 2026.

tasks.instruction: Locate a red heirloom paste tomato suitable for canning that is resistant to both fusarium and verticillium wilts, open its review form, and submit a 5‑star review using a test name, title, and detailed comment.

review.title: Excellent for sauces
review.comment: Produced heavily in my small garden and made great pasta sauce all season.

tasks.instruction: In the garden planner, schedule two separate plantings of the same red heirloom paste tomato used for canning that resists fusarium and verticillium, with 4 plants on each of two spring 2026 dates spaced about a month apart.
